<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band05_chunk004.pdf#page=8 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band05 p164 -->

LAUTERBACH

<!-- header: LAUTERBACE -->


[[File:Band05_chunk004_p008_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band05_chunk004_p008_img002.jpg|thumb|B Abigail vor David]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band05 p165 -->
